title: Login endpoint rate limiting
selected_reason: Highest scoring candidate: security 5, stability 4, parent trust 3, zero implementation risk. Reuses existing _check_rate_limit infrastructure.
acceptance_criteria: _RATE_LIMIT_LOGIN constant exists (5/min)
Rate limit fires before credential validation
429 response is generic (no credential leak)
3 new backend tests pass
JS source-level test updated
All existing tests pass

title: Account-level login lockout after N failed attempts
selected_reason: Highest scoring candidate after T47. Complements IP rate limiting with account-level defense against credential stuffing from distributed IPs.
acceptance_criteria: After N failed login attempts for same username, account is temporarily locked
Lock duration is configurable
Lock does not prevent other accounts from logging in
Lockout state stored in DB (survives restart)
Tests cover lockout trigger, lockout expiry, and no cross-account impact

title: Student selector for multi-student accounts
selected_reason: Highest-scoring automatable candidate after all P0/P1 security tasks done. Parents with multi-student accounts could only see the first student's report.
acceptance_criteria: Login response includes list of students
UI shows student selector when account has >1 student
Selected student is used for bootstrap call
Single-student accounts skip selector

title: Revoke exposed OpenAI API key and clean git history
acceptance_criteria: Key revoked at OpenAI
gpt_key_20251110.txt removed from git history
Force-push completed
No secrets found in git history scan
next_action: human must execute steps in SECURITY_MANUAL_ACTIONS.md

title: Failed login attempt logging/alerting
selected_reason: Next highest-scoring automatable candidate after T48. Provides operational visibility into login security events.
acceptance_criteria: Failed login attempts logged with timestamp, IP, username
No password logged
Log accessible for monitoring

title: Remove Gist read fallback from student_auth.js
selected_reason: Highest-scoring automatable candidate after all P0-P2 tasks completed. Gist read fallback was legacy dead code referencing external GitHub infrastructure.
acceptance_criteria: GIST_ID and GIST_API constants removed
Gist fetch fallback removed from lookupStudentReport
No api.github.com/gists references in any frontend file
All existing tests pass

title: Admin login-failure anomaly detection (summary stats + alert level)
selected_reason: Highest-scoring fully automatable candidate after all P0-P3 tasks completed. Extends existing admin audit endpoint with operational intelligence for anomaly detection.
acceptance_criteria: Admin response includes summary object with total_failures, unique_ips, unique_usernames, locked_accounts, alert_level
Alert level is normal (<10), elevated (10-50), or critical (>50)
Locked accounts list correctly identifies accounts at/above lockout threshold
+2 backend tests pass
+5 JS source-level assertions pass
All existing tests pass

title: Password recovery flow design (admin-assisted MVP + email scale-up)
selected_reason: Highest-scoring remaining candidate (security 3, parent trust 3, impl risk 0 for design-only). Parents who forget passwords currently have no recovery path ??commercial blocker at scale.
acceptance_criteria: Architecture analysis of current auth system documented
At least 3 design options evaluated with pros/cons
Recommended approach identified with impacted files
Security considerations documented
Validation plan for eventual implementation documented
Task marked manual_review_required ??no code changes
next_action: human reviews design in iteration 53 report section and approves Option A (admin-assisted MVP) for implementation

title: Fix audit STRUCT-FRAC-002 false positive + close DEC-001 registry
selected_reason: Tiebreaker vs health check endpoint: stability (audit accuracy, priority 2) beats new feature expansion (priority 8). False positive in audit could mask future regressions.
acceptance_criteria: Audit outputs 0 errors, 0 warnings
DEC-001 commit field updated from pending to bf690c829
Injected fracAdd SVG regression IS detected
No production file changes
verify_all 4/4 OK

title: Implement admin-assisted password recovery MVP
selected_reason: Password recovery design was completed in iteration 53, but implementation touches account recovery flow and therefore requires explicit human approval before execution.
acceptance_criteria: Human explicitly approves Option A (admin-assisted MVP) for implementation
Implementation scope remains bounded to the approved admin-assisted recovery flow only
No credential leakage or insecure reset path is introduced
Relevant auth and security checks remain green
verify_all remains green after implementation

title: Add health check endpoint for operational monitoring
selected_reason: This is a bounded, automatable operational task that improves observability and is suitable when higher-priority security tasks remain blocked pending human approval.
acceptance_criteria: A minimal health check endpoint exists and returns a deterministic success response in healthy state
The endpoint does not expose secrets or sensitive internal details
The change remains operationally bounded and does not expand into alerting, threshold tuning, or log-rotation work
Relevant checks remain green
verify_all remains green after implementation

title: Harden pricing page mock/dev controls (production safety)
selected_reason: Mock payment controls were callable from browser console, allowing free users to grant themselves paid status via localStorage mutation. Hardened with __AIMATH_DEV__ runtime guard.
acceptance_criteria: Mock functions no-op unless window.__AIMATH_DEV__ is explicitly set
Dev panel requires both __AIMATH_DEV__ and ?dev=1
Production CTA flow (handleCheckout, confirmTrial, confirmDirectPaid) unchanged
verify_all remains green

title: Server-side subscription verification (Stripe webhook ??backend state)
selected_reason: localStorage-only subscription state allowed direct tampering. Added Stripe webhook handler + verify endpoint + frontend anti-tampering reconciliation.
acceptance_criteria: POST /v1/stripe/webhook with HMAC-SHA256 signature verification
GET /v1/subscription/verify returns status without 402
Frontend verifyWithServer() overrides tampered localStorage
verify_all remains green

title: Parent report UX: loading spinners, better errors, preview insights
selected_reason: Parent report lacked loading feedback (parents thought UI frozen), had vague error messages, and showed no value preview behind blur overlays — all friction points for trust and conversion.
acceptance_criteria: Animated CSS spinners during async flows (cloud lookup, paid login)
Specific error messages for PIN errors, cloud not-found, network failures
Preview insights behind blur overlays (radar weak concepts, trend weekly delta)
verify_all 4/4 OK
